Flow.description: Will trigger from flow: Opportunity_sc_Next_Stage From schduled flow: Opportunity - Scheduled - Daily Re-calculate MEDDPICC Recommended Close Date And from opp after save And from Code

formulas.description:
{!Summary_Recommended_Close_Date} matches the actual date stored in medpic_Recommended_Close_Date__c on the Opportunity.
Problem: The field {!Summary_Recommended_Close_Date} contains a long text string in a fixed format, for example:
Your current close date is 2025-08-21 The recommended close date is 2025-08-21 or later 🟩
Since the date appears inside plain text, it cannot be directly compared with a Date field.
Solution:
Use FIND to locate the starting position of the phrase "Your current close date is ".
Use MID to extract the next 10 characters → the date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
Use DATEVALUE to convert this string into a valid Date value.
Compare it against the Opportunity field medpic_Recommended_Close_Date__c.
Result: The formula returns TRUE if the extracted date equals the recommended Close Date, and FALSE otherwise.
formulas.name: Close_Dates_Equal
formulas.expression: IF( CONTAINS({!Get_Opp_Fields.medpic_Recommended_Close_Date__c}, "Your current close date is "), DATEVALUE( MID( {!Get_Opp_Fields.medpic_Recommended_Close_Date__c}, FIND("Your current close date is ",{!Get_Opp_Fields.medpic_Recommended_Close_Date__c}) + LEN("Your current close date is "), 10 ) ) = {!Get_Opp_Fields.CloseDate}, FALSE )

formulas.name: Recommend_Close_Date_Verdict
formulas.expression: IF( TEXT({!Get_Opp_Fields.StageName}) = "Initial Discovery", "Initial Discovery", IF( CASE( IF( AND( {!verdict_CloseDate_1_champion} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_2_Identify_Pain} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_3_Decision_Criteria} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_4_Decision_Process} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_5_EconomicBuyer} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_7_Paper_Process} = "🟩" ), IF( TEXT({!Get_Opp_Fields.StageName}) = "Contracts", "Contracts", "Scope Confirmation" ), IF( AND( {!verdict_CloseDate_1_champion} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_2_Identify_Pain} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_3_Decision_Criteria} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_4_Decision_Process} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_5_EconomicBuyer} = "🟩" ), "Solution Validation", IF( AND( {!verdict_CloseDate_1_champion} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_2_Identify_Pain} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_3_Decision_Criteria} = "🟩" ), "Sales Qualified", "Initial Discovery" ) ) ), "Initial Discovery", 1, "Sales Qualified", 2, "Solution Validation", 3, "Scope Confirmation", 4, "Contracts", 5, 0 ) <= CASE( TEXT({!Get_Opp_Fields.StageName}), "Initial Discovery", 1, "Sales Qualified", 2, "Solution Validation", 3, "Scope Confirmation", 4, "Contracts", 5, 0 ), IF( AND( {!verdict_CloseDate_1_champion} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_2_Identify_Pain} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_3_Decision_Criteria} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_4_Decision_Process} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_5_EconomicBuyer} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_7_Paper_Process} = "🟩" ), IF( TEXT({!Get_Opp_Fields.StageName}) = "Contracts", "Contracts", "Scope Confirmation" ), IF( AND( {!verdict_CloseDate_1_champion} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_2_Identify_Pain} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_3_Decision_Criteria} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_4_Decision_Process} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_5_EconomicBuyer} = "🟩" ), "Solution Validation", IF( AND( {!verdict_CloseDate_1_champion} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_2_Identify_Pain} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_3_Decision_Criteria} = "🟩" ), "Sales Qualified", "Initial Discovery" ) ) ), TEXT({!Get_Opp_Fields.StageName}) ) )

formulas.name: Recommended_Close_Date
formulas.expression: IF( {!Get_Opp_Fields.CloseDate} >= CASE( {!Recommend_Close_Date_Verdict}, "Initial Discovery", TODAY() + 120, "Sales Qualified", TODAY() + 120, "Solution Validation", TODAY() + 60, "Scope Confirmation", TODAY() + 10, "Contracts", TODAY(), TODAY() ), "Your current close date is " & TEXT( {!Get_Opp_Fields.CloseDate} ) & BR() & "The recommended close date is " & TEXT( CASE( {!Recommend_Close_Date_Verdict}, "Initial Discovery", TODAY() + 120, "Sales Qualified", TODAY() + 120, "Solution Validation", TODAY() + 60, "Scope Confirmation", TODAY() + 10, "Contracts", TODAY(), TODAY() ) ) & " or later 🟩", "Your current close date is " & TEXT( {!Get_Opp_Fields.CloseDate}) & BR() & "The recommended close date is " & TEXT( CASE( {!Recommend_Close_Date_Verdict}, "Initial Discovery", TODAY() + 120, "Sales Qualified", TODAY() + 120, "Solution Validation", TODAY() + 60, "Scope Confirmation", TODAY() + 10, "Contracts", TODAY(), TODAY() ) ) & " 🟥" )

formulas.name: SMB_Recommended_Close_Date
formulas.expression: IF( {!Get_Opp_Fields.CloseDate} >= CASE( {!Recommend_Close_Date_Verdict}, "Initial Discovery", TODAY() + 40, "Sales Qualified", TODAY() + 28, "Solution Validation", TODAY() +14, "Scope Confirmation", TODAY() + 3, "Contracts", TODAY(), TODAY() ), "Your current close date is " & TEXT( {!Get_Opp_Fields.CloseDate}) & BR() & "The recommended close date is " & TEXT( CASE( {!Recommend_Close_Date_Verdict}, "Initial Discovery", TODAY() + 40, "Sales Qualified", TODAY() + 28, "Solution Validation", TODAY() +14, "Scope Confirmation", TODAY() + 3, "Contracts", TODAY(), TODAY() ) )& " or later 🟩", "Your current close date is " & TEXT( {!Get_Opp_Fields.CloseDate}) & BR() & "The recommended close date is " & TEXT( CASE( {!Recommend_Close_Date_Verdict}, "Initial Discovery", TODAY() + 40, "Sales Qualified", TODAY() + 28, "Solution Validation", TODAY() +14, "Scope Confirmation", TODAY() + 3, "Contracts", TODAY(), TODAY() ) ) & " 🟥" )

Flow.label: Opportunity - AL - MEDPIC Calculations
